sources.name: Anthropic Agent Skills

license.evidence: Apache 2.0 for most skills per README; document skills (docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx) are source-available not open source, packaged as reference implementations

activation_evidence: 160k stars on GitHub, #1 agent skills repo by popularity
Apache-2.0 license verified in repo README
17+ SKILL.md files with frontmatter in skills/ directory
Already listed in multiple awesome-agent-skills collections
sources.activation_reason: Canonical official Anthropic skills repo with 160k stars. Apache-2.0 licensed. 17+ structured SKILL.md files across creative, development, enterprise, and document domains. Public, no credentials needed, sync tooling supports git strategy. Active status appropriate given maturity, official status, and clear license.

sources.name: Figma MCP Skills

license.evidence: Repo governed by Figma Developer Terms. Skills are downloadable and usable by any agentic tool. Beta feature, free during beta.

activation_evidence: 10+ SKILL.md files in skills/ and workflow-skills/ directories
Skills downloadable as ZIP, installable via Claude Code/Cursor plugins
Figma Developer Terms explicitly permit agent use of skills
Referenced by VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills as canonical Figma skills source
sources.activation_reason: Official Figma MCP server skills with 1.7k stars. 10+ structured SKILL.md files. Public, downloadable, no credentials. License is Figma Developer Terms (not standard OSS), which permits agent use but warrants preview status rather than active. Covers entirely new design/Figma domain.

sources.name: Skills for Figma (Southleft)

license.evidence: LICENSE file in repo root confirms MIT

activation_evidence: MIT license confirmed via LICENSE file in repo root
18+ SKILL.md files across design tokens, components, accessibility, and FigJam/Slides
All skills run through Figma MCP use_figma — no plan-gated APIs
Referenced in VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills as a Figma skills source
sources.activation_reason: Community-built Figma skills collection with MIT license. 18+ structured SKILL.md files covering design tokens, components, accessibility, annotations, FigJam, and slides — deeper than official Figma skills. 9 stars (small), but content quality is high and domain is novel. Preview appropriate.

sources.name: Frontend Designer Skill

license.evidence: LICENSE file in repo root confirms Apache License 2.0

activation_evidence: Apache-2.0 license verified via LICENSE file in repo root
1 SKILL.md (v3.0) with references/ — compact runtime contract with decision trees and anti-pattern blocks
Claims validated against W3C specs, MDN, Evil Martians, Can I Use
Covers novel frontend domain entirely absent from current catalog
sources.activation_reason: Single comprehensive frontend CSS architecture skill, Apache-2.0. Research-validated with W3C/MDN cross-references. 0 stars (niche/new). 1 SKILL.md but reference-quality. Preview appropriate for small single-skill source in uncovered domain.
